info.title: ytworkflo
info.description:
## 🎬 ytworkflo — YouTube Automation Platform

A powerful, fully-typed FastAPI backend for automating YouTube workflows.

### Features
- 🔍 **Search** — Full-text search with filters, sorting, and pagination
- 📹 **Video Info** — Metadata, stats, formats, chapters, thumbnails
- 📺 **Channel** — Channel info, videos, playlists, community posts
- 🎵 **Audio** — Extract audio, convert formats, get waveform info
- 📝 **Transcripts** — Auto/manual captions, translation, timestamped segments
- ⬇️ **Download** — Download video/audio with quality selection
- 🔴 **Stream** — Proxy streaming URLs, live stream detection
- 📊 **Analytics** — Engagement metrics, estimated reach, performance scores
- 🖼️ **Thumbnails** — Fetch all thumbnail resolutions
- 💬 **Comments** — Top/recent comments, replies, sentiment
- 📦 **Batch** — Bulk operations on multiple videos/channels
- 🔥 **Trending** — Trending videos by region and category
- 🌐 **Subtitles** — Download/convert subtitle formats (VTT, SRT, JSON)
- 📋 **Formats** — List all available formats for a video

post.description: Full-text YouTube search with filters, ordering, and pagination.

get.description: GET version of search — pass query as query param.
Returns autocomplete suggestions for a query using YouTube's suggestion API.

schema.title: Response Search Suggestions Api V1 Search Suggest Get

get.description: Fetch videos related to a given video by searching its title and tags.
Full metadata for a YouTube video including formats, thumbnails, chapters, subtitles.

post.description: POST-based video info fetch, useful when passing full URLs.

get.description: Returns only core metadata without format list — faster response.
Returns chapter markers with timestamps.

schema.title: Response Get Chapters Api V1 Video  Video Id  Chapters Get

get.description: Returns heatmap data showing most replayed moments.

schema.title: Response Get Heatmap Api V1 Video  Video Id  Heatmap Get
Response Get Tags Api V1 Video  Video Id  Tags Get

get.description: Returns all subtitle languages (manual + auto-generated) for a video.

get.summary: Check if video is a live stream

get.description: Fetch channel metadata: subscriber count, description, thumbnails, etc.
List videos from a channel with pagination.
Fetch playlist metadata and all video entries.

post.description: Download a YouTube video or audio to the server's download directory.

get.description: Returns a direct CDN URL for the video without downloading to server.
Serve a previously downloaded file by filename.
Lists all files currently in the download directory.
Returns direct streaming URL for a video. URL may expire.
302 redirect directly to the video stream URL.
Returns HLS (.m3u8) manifest URL for adaptive streaming.
Returns DASH (.mpd) manifest URL.
Check if a video/channel is live and return live stream URLs.
Returns direct audio-only streaming URL.

post.description: Download and extract audio from a video to the server.

get.description: Returns only audio formats available for a video.
Fetches timestamped transcript/caption segments for a video.

get.summary: Get full transcript as plain text

get.description: Returns all thumbnail URLs for a video at every available resolution.
Engagement metrics, heatmap, performance score, and top moments.

post.description: Fetch metadata for up to 50 videos in one request.
Queue download for up to 20 videos.
Fetch transcripts for up to 20 videos.

get.description: Returns all available download formats for a video.

schema.title: Response Filter Formats Api V1 Formats Filter Post

get.description: Fetches top or recent comments for a video.
Fetch currently trending YouTube videos by region and category.
Fetch subtitle/caption content for a video in the requested format.

post.description: Download subtitle file to server and return file info.

get.description: Returns subtitle as a raw file download.
Returns all available subtitle languages for a video.
Returns platform health status.
